summary: Tested 3 features for iteration 16: (1) employee_code required+unique+manual on /api/employees, (2) lead.job_role enrichment on /api/leads and /api/leads/{id}, (3) Open Positions widget on /api/dashboard/stats with date-filter-aware applicants. Backend: 7/7 pytest pass. Frontend UI verified end-to-end via Playwright on the public URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Login redirect lands on '/' not '/dashboard' — works because dashboard renders at root for authed CEO; minor inconsistency to be aware of in future tests.
Excel import in /app/backend/routes/employees.py still auto-generates EMPxxxx when Employee Code is blank (acceptable since spec only required UI/manual create to be manual; flagged for awareness).
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own jobs/leads/employees with TEST_ / UI_ prefixes and clean up after themselves. No residual seed data left in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16_features.py covers: emp code missing(422)/empty(400)/duplicate(409)/unique-create/update-conflict/update-empty/update-success, leads job_role list+detail, dashboard open_positions with role/openings/applicants and future-date applicant=0. All passed. UI features (open-positions-card with head_office/franchise columns; lead-job-role-{id} chips on /leads/head-office; lead-job-role-badge on /leads/{id}; emp-code-input in Add Employee dialog with required asterisk) all confirmed visually working.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; all 3 features implemented correctly and verified.
